_doc: SRD 5.2.1 species. SRD 5.2 species grant traits but no fixed ability score increases (those moved to backgrounds). Trait summaries paraphrase SRD 5.2.1 mechanics (CC-BY; see /disclaimer).

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.summary: Gain Heroic Inspiration after a long rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.summary: Proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.summary: Gain an Origin feat at level 1.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.summary: Advantage on saves to avoid/end charmed.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.summary: Proficient in Insight, Perception, or Survival.

traits.name: Trance
traits.summary: Long rest in 4 hours; learn a cantrip and a tool/skill.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.summary: Learn Prestidigitation and a wizard cantrip; later Detect Magic & Misty Step.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.summary: Druidcraft cantrip; +5 ft speed; Longstrider, Pass without Trace at higher levels.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.summary: Dancing Lights; later Faerie Fire & Darkness; superior darkvision 120 ft.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.summary: Resistance to poison; advantage on saves vs poisoned.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.summary: +1 HP per level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.summary: Bonus action: 60-ft tremorsense for 10 min; PB uses per long rest.

traits.name: Brave
traits.summary: Advantage on saves vs frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.summary: Move through space of any larger creature.

traits.name: Luck
traits.summary: Reroll a natural 1 on a d20 test; use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.summary: Hide while obscured by a larger creature.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.summary: Choose dragon type; sets Breath Weapon damage type and resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.summary: Replace one attack: 15-ft cone or 30-ft line, DEX save, PB×d10 damage.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.summary: Resistance to your ancestry damage type.

traits.name: Draconic Flight (L5)
traits.summary: Bonus action: sprout wings, fly speed = walking, 10 min, 1/long rest.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.summary: Advantage on INT, WIS, CHA saves vs magic.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.summary: Choose Forest (Minor Illusion + extra cantrip) or Rock (tinkering).

traits.name: Forest Lineage
traits.summary: Minor Illusion cantrip; later Speak with Animals & Invisibility.

traits.name: Rock Lineage
traits.summary: Mending and Prestidigitation; build clockwork toys.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.summary: Bonus action: Dash + temp HP = PB; PB uses per long rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.summary: Count as one size larger for carrying capacity / push / drag / lift.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.summary: Drop to 0 HP without dying once per long rest.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.summary: Choose Abyssal/Chthonic/Infernal — sets Thaumaturgy variant + spells.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.summary: Learn Thaumaturgy or chosen lineage cantrip.

traits.name: Abyssal Legacy
traits.summary: Resistance to poison; later spells include Hold Person & Stinking Cloud.

traits.name: Chthonic Legacy
traits.summary: Resistance to necrotic; later spells include False Life & Ray of Enfeeblement.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.summary: Resistance to fire; later spells include Hellish Rebuke & Darkness.

traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.summary: Resistance to necrotic and radiant.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.summary: Touch heals d4 per level, 1/long rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.summary: Know the Light cantrip.

traits.name: Celestial Revelation (L3)
traits.summary: Choose Heavenly Wings, Inner Radiance, or Necrotic Shroud transformation.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.summary: Choose a giant lineage (Cloud / Fire / Frost / Hill / Stone / Storm).

traits.name: Large Form (L5)
traits.summary: Bonus action: count as Large for 10 min; advantage on STR checks; +10 ft push, 1/long rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.summary: Count as one size larger for carrying / push / drag / lift.
